title: Hiring Medical Officer at Sankara Nethralaya

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Sankara Nethralaya
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!
